title: Walin'or (disambiguation)
content:
'''Walin'or''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Walin'or system/Legends|Walin'or system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]
*The '''[[Walin'or cell]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell originating in the Walin'or system

{{Disambig}}
